title: FACILITY DOGS - 211info
text: DOGS FOR BETTER LIVES FACILITY DOGS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained dogs to assist full-time professionals and volunteers who work with people with various disabilities. The dogs are trained in a variety of interactive behaviors and tasks to maximize their impact in professional environments and can encourage enhanced engagement, anxiety reduction, motivation, and cooperation. 10175 Wheeler Road Central Point, OR 97502 Eligibility: Individuals who are employed in a role that directly serves individuals with disabilities or vulnerable populations, such as healthcare workers, therapists, teachers, counselors, or forensic interviewers. Must have approval from employer. Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-2:30pm Email (541) 826-9220 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 826-9220 Toll-free (800) 990-3647 Outside of Oregon Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for online application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Service Animals Other Services Offered At This Location: REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - AUTISM ASSISTANCE DOGS REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - HEARING DOGS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOGS FOR BETTER LIVES
